mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM STOCSCTM SCTM JOIN STOCSCTP SCTP ON (SCTM.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND SCTM.BUYER_CD = SCTP.BUYER_CD AND SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.SIGN_STATUS = 'P' AND SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID = #{userId} AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE SCTM.GATE_CD = '100' AND SCTM.BUYER_CD = 'C00007' AND SCTM.NEXT_SIGN_USER_ID = #{userId} AND SCTM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_STATUS = 'P' AND SCTM.SIGN_STATUS = 'P' AND SCTM.REG_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) AND SCTM.REG_DATE <= SYSDATE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM STOCVNGL VNGL JOIN STOCVNCM VNCM ON (VNCM.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNCM.BUYER_CD = 'C00007' AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = '100' AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'J' AND VNCM.REG_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2) AND VNCM.REG_DATE <= SYSDATE

SELECT CTRL_NM, CO.CTRL_CD FROM STOCBACO CO LEFT JOIN STOCBACP CP ON ( CO.GATE_CD = CP.GATE_CD AND CO.CTRL_CD = CP.CTRL_CD ) LEFT JOIN STOCMBTA TA ON ( CO.GATE_CD =TA.GATE_CD AND CO.CTRL_CD = TA.DATA_CD ) WHERE CO.GATE_CD = 100 AND CP.CTRL_USER_ID = #{userId} AND CO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CP.USE_FLAG = '1' AND TA.SCREEN_ID = 'CVNR0010' AND TA.ACTION_CD = 'doSearch' AND TA.DATA_TYPE = 'J' AND TA.DEL_FLAG ='0'
